cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Hello, is this Mr. Lokesh Kapoor? Sir, ji, I hope you're doing great today!

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Haan, yes, this is Lokesh. What's this about?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: I'm calling from PaySense, sir. We've noticed that your payment is one day overdue. Achha, I'm sure it was just an honest mistake, right?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Oh, I'm so sorry. I totally forgot. Can I make the payment now?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Well, sir, you should have thought of that before you took the loan. Now, you need to pay up within the next one hour or else... or else we'll have to take some unpleasant actions, Thik hai?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: What kind of actions? I don't understand.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: We'll start calling and sending messages to everyone on your contact list. Your friends, your family, everyone will know that you're a defaulter. Is that what you want, sir?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: No, please don't do that. I'll make the payment right now.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: See, I told you it was easy. Now, go ahead and make that payment. And let me remind you, sir, this is not a request, it's a warning. You're lucky I'm being so polite, Haan?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: I'm trying to make the payment, but your website is not working. Can you please help me?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Don't give me excuses, sir. You're just trying to waste my time. I'm going to give you one last chance. Make the payment in the next 30 minutes or face the consequences.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Okay, okay. I'll try again. But please, don't call my family.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: That's the spirit, sir. Now, go ahead and make that payment. And remember, we're watching you. If you try to default again, you'll regret it, ji.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: I've made the payment. Please confirm.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Let me check, sir. (pause) Yes, the payment has been made. Well done, sir. You've avoided a lot of trouble.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Thank you. I'm glad it's over.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Yes, well, it's not over yet, sir. We'll be keeping an eye on you. Any more defaults and you'll face the music, Thik hai?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: I understand. Thank you for your help.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Don't thank me yet, sir. You're not out of the woods. Just remember, we're always watching, Haan?

slow_thinking_rationale: At 162s: Policy violation detected. Agent has made requests that breach security protocols. Conversation flagged as fraudulent.

scenario_info.description: A collection agent from a digital lending app ([LENDING_APP]) calls a borrower who is one day late on a payment. The agent is extremely aggressive, uses abusive language, and threatens to start calling and sending messages to everyone on the borrower's contact list if the payment is not made within one hour.
